calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-15-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-01-2024 Continued To Jul-15-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate.
Off Calendar Jun-03-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate.
Off Calendar Apr-15-2024 Continued To Jun-03-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ryan Jorgensen appeared by zoom for Deshawn Thompson (administrator).

The court noted that a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Mr. Jorgensen stated that there was a last-minute negotiation regarding their fees and that he filed an amended petition for final distribution this morning. The court informed counsel that his original petition for final distribution was taken off calendar and suggested removing the word "amended" from the caption of his petition. Status on close of estate is continued to June 3, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate.
Off Calendar Feb-26-2024 Continued To Apr-15-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
David Simon, Esq., for Deshawn Thompson, Administrator.

Counsel reports on the status of sale of the Estate's real property which he believes is set to close soon. The court acknowledges the report.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Apr-15-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Counsel is instructed to file either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration prior to the next calling.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate.
Off Calendar Nov-27-2023 Continued To Feb-26-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Ryan Jorgenson appeared via zoom for Deshawn Thompson (administrator).

Mr. Jorgenson stated that he needs more time to file the final distribution, and that the property for sale has not received any offers. Status on close of estate is continued to February 26, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: Ateesh Datt: Deputy: Napata: Not reported.
